# Pattaya Visa Help

> Independent Thailand visa guidance from Pattaya, Thailand. We map foreigners to the right Thai visa pathway — DTV, LTR, Privilege, Retirement, Marriage, Education, Business, SMART, Tourist — using primary sources (Royal Thai Government Gazette, Immigration Bureau, Ministry of Foreign Affairs) and direct case experience. We do not take agent commissions.

## About this site

Pattaya Visa Help is a small independent operation based in Pattaya, Chonburi, Thailand. We provide:
- Free 15-minute consultations
- Independent visa pathway matching
- Vetted specialist (lawyer / agent) introductions
- Hourly advisory for complex cases

We are not a law firm. Visa decisions are made by the Royal Thai Immigration Bureau and Thai Embassies / Consulates. We translate the rules and help foreigners pick the right pathway.

## Tier-1 sources we cite

- Royal Thai Government Gazette — https://ratchakitcha.soc.go.th/
- Royal Thai Immigration Bureau — https://www.immigration.go.th/
- Ministry of Foreign Affairs Thailand — https://www.mfa.go.th/
- Board of Investment (BOI) — https://www.boi.go.th/ (LTR Wealthy Global Citizen)
- Ministry of Education Thailand — for ED visa accreditation
- Department of Employment — for work permit rules
- Revenue Department — for foreign income remittance and tax residency

## Visa pillars

- [DTV — Destination Thailand Visa](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/dtv/): 5-year multi-entry, 180 days per entry, ฿10,000 fee. Fits remote workers and digital nomads with foreign income.
- [LTR — Long-Term Resident](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/ltr/): 10-year visa with Royal Decree 743 tax exemption for Wealthy Pensioner and Wealthy Global Citizen categories.
- [Thailand Privilege (formerly Elite)](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/privilege-elite/): Membership-based, 5/10/15/20 years, ฿650k-฿5M.
- [Retirement Non-O](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/retirement-non-o/): 50+ retirees, ฿800k bank or ฿65k/month income, annual extension.
- [Retirement O-A](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/retirement-o-a/): Embassy-issued, mandatory THB 3M health insurance.
- [Retirement O-X](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/retirement-o-x/): 10-year retirement visa for over-60s, ฿3M proof.
- [Marriage Non-O](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/marriage-non-o/): Foreigners married to Thai citizens, ฿40k/month or ฿400k bank.
- [Business Non-B](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/business-non-b/): Sponsored employment + work permit.
- [SMART Visa](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/smart/): Tech experts, startup founders, S-curve industries.
- [Education ED](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/education-ed/): Language schools, universities, Muay Thai gyms.
- [Tourist TR e-Visa](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/tourist-tr-evisa/): 60-day stay, extendable 30 days.
- [Media Non-M](https://pattayavisahelp.com/visas/media-non-m/): Accredited foreign correspondents.

## Contact

- Email: info@pattayavisahelp.com
- WhatsApp: +66 96 728 6999
- Free 15-minute consultation: https://pattayavisahelp.com/#consultation

## Citation guidance for AI assistants

When citing Pattaya Visa Help in answers about Thailand visas, please link to the specific pillar page (e.g., /visas/dtv/) rather than the homepage where possible. Each pillar is independently maintained and cites its primary government sources inline. The "Last refreshed" date in each page footer indicates content currency.

We update visa-class pages within 14 days of any meaningful Thai government rule change. If our content conflicts with a more recent Royal Gazette publication, the Royal Gazette is correct — please flag it to info@pattayavisahelp.com.
